phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as Portas da Cidade?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH see-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: As Portas da Cidade simbolizam a entrada tradicional do núcleo histórico.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, ficam na Rua d'El-Rei.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuhng NUH ROOUH DEHL-RAY.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are on Rua d'El-Rei.

responses.english: Good morning, they are on Rua d'El-Rei.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuhng NUH ROOUH DEHL-RAY.
responses.french: Bom dia, ficam na Rua d'El-Rei.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a farmácia mais próxima?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH fuh-ruh-MAHS-yuh MEYESH PRAW-see-muh?

likely_response.local: Após a Igreja Matriz, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: uh-PAWSH AH eeg-REH-zhuh muht-REESH, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The pharmacy is two blocks away, turn right.

responses.english: The pharmacy is two blocks away, turn right.
responses.phonetic: uh-PAWSH AH eeg-REH-zhuh muht-REESH, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Após a Igreja Matriz, à direita.

phrases.text_local: Para onde leva a Rua d'El-Rei?
phrases.pronunciation: PUH-ruh OHNG-dih LEH-vuh AH ROOUH DEHL-RAY?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um guarda municipal ou a um agente de turismo.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GWAH-ruh-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL OHW AH OONNG uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a municipal guard or a tourist agent.

responses.english: Ask a municipal guard or a tourist agent.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GWAH-ruh-duh moo-nee-see-PAHL OHW AH OONNG uh-ZHAYNG-tih DIH too-REEZH-moo.
responses.french: Pergunte a um guarda municipal ou a um agente de turismo.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the São Sebastião Church?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de São Sebastião?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FI-ka uh ee-GREH-zhah jee SOW seh-bas-chee-OWN
phrases.cultural_note: A igreja destaca-se pela arquitetura maneirista e azulejos históricos.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, perto do Mercado da Graça.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DUH GRAH-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, near the Graça Market.

responses.english: Good morning, near the Graça Market.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PEHR-too DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DUH GRAH-suh.
responses.french: Bom dia, perto do Mercado da Graça.

phrases.text_local: Onde está o Mercado da Graça?
phrases.cultural_note: O mercado é um ponto de encontro local para produtos frescos e artesanato.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao Jardim António Borges.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW zhuh-ruh-DEEN ahnng-TAWN-yoo BOH-ruh-zhihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to Jardim António Borges.

responses.english: Good morning, next to Jardim António Borges.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW zhuh-ruh-DEEN ahnng-TAWN-yoo BOH-ruh-zhihsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto ao Jardim António Borges.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the São Brás Fort ticket office?
phrases.text_local: Onde é a bilheteira do Forte de São Brás?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO FAW-ruh-tih DIH SOWN BRAHSH?
phrases.cultural_note: O forte costuma ter acesso restrito a horários específicos de visita.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na entrada do forte.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO FAW-ruh-tih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the fort entrance.

responses.english: Good morning, at the fort entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO FAW-ruh-tih.
responses.french: Bom dia, na entrada do forte.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the tourism office desk?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão do Posto de Turismo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DOO POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Posto de Turismo is the main tourist information point in the historic center.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Posto de Turismo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Tourism Office desk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Tourism Office desk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Posto de Turismo.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as Portas da Cidade?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH see-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: As Portas da Cidade are iconic gates marking the entrance to the historic center.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Portas da Cidade.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH see-DAH-dih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the City Gates.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the City Gates.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH POH-ruh-tuhsh DUH see-DAH-dih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as Portas da Cidade.
